module.name: prompt
module.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including raw strict JSON response requirements, no-Markdown-fence output constraints, single-string tool and model input guidance, flat model-facing PlanDraft step objects, and answer-only Initial and Analysis JSON for requests that are already answerable.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step model prompt templates for Initial and Analysis. Both emit the flat model-facing PlanDraft shape with tool/model run_steps and intent pending_steps, or an answer-only JSON object when the request is already answerable.
